lines: Cassia slides a burial copy beneath the dry corner of a flour cloth.
"Paper lasts longer here than in the council cupboard. Nobody opens that when the roof leaks."

choices.label: Ask why a burial copy protects water
Leave Cassia to the next bake

lines: "A dead witness can prove the household was here before a Compact count. The same line may hand an old debt to the child now carrying the cup."
She folds the cloth back over it. "So I keep the whole line, however badly it sits."

choices.label: Leave the copy under dry cloth
